trades.reasoning: Highest score (100) with full multi-signal confirmation: RSI 69.4 in bullish zone, MACD bullish crossover with rising histogram, price above SMA-20, and a volume surge.
Score 95 with RSI 64.6 in the bullish zone, MACD bullish crossover with rising histogram, and price well above SMA-20 on a risk-on day.
Established semiconductor name with score 95, RSI 62.4 still below overbought, and confirmed bullish MACD crossover, offering a more stable way to deploy cash alongside the speculative RGC pick.

decisions.briefing: Markets rallied today with NASDAQ +1.1% and S&P 500 +0.7%, a clear risk-on signal. With 4 open slots and cash above the $500 threshold, we deployed into RGC (full technical confirmation), plus NBIS and MU as medium-conviction adds to diversify beyond a single low-priced speculative name.

market_education.summary_en: Broad-based buying lifted tech and semiconductor names today, pushing the NASDAQ up 1.1% and the S&P 500 up 0.7%. Stocks with bullish technical setups — rising RSI, MACD crossovers, and prices above key moving averages — led the advance. No single dominant news catalyst appeared in today's data, suggesting the move reflected sector-wide risk appetite rather than a specific headline.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日科技股與半導體股全面走強，帶動納斯達克指數上漲1.1%，標普500指數上漲0.7%。RSI走升、MACD出現黃金交叉、股價站上主要均線等技術面轉強的動能股表現領先大盤。今日數據並未顯示明確的單一新聞催化劑，顯示此次上漲較可能是由板塊性風險偏好回升所帶動，而非個別消息面驅動。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing means buying stocks that are already trending upward, on the idea that strength tends to continue in the short term. Traders look for confirming signals — like RSI in a healthy range, a bullish MACD crossover, and price above key moving averages — before buying, rather than relying on just one indicator.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能投資是指買入已經呈現上漲趨勢的股票，基於短期內強勢股票傾向延續漲勢的邏輯。交易者通常會尋找多項技術指標同時確認，例如RSI處於健康區間、MACD出現黃金交叉、股價站上關鍵均線，而非僅依賴單一指標。
